channel.title: whimsysoul
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

item.title: Annual tradition that can't be missed!! 🏳️‍🌈✨🙏 Hunky Jesus contest takes place every Easter Sunday at Dolores park! 🏳️‍🌈 The Sisters’ Easter Celebration starts at Noon (Easter Bonnet, Foxy Mary) and then Hunky Jesus is at 3pm! See you there #sanfrancisc
item.description: Annual tradition that can't be missed!! 🏳️‍🌈✨🙏 Hunky Jesus contest takes place every Easter Sunday at Dolores park! 🏳️‍🌈 The Sisters’ Easter Celebration starts at Noon (Easter Bonnet, Foxy Mary) and then Hunky Jesus is at 3pm! See you there #sanfrancisc

item.title: Sister Act church in San Francisco! ⬇️🙏🎶 🎥Welcome to SF On Screen, the series where I show you all the wonderful TV shows and movies filmed in San Francisco🎥 Sister Act is one of my go-to feel good movies, and I love how it takes place right here in San F
item.description: Sister Act church in San Francisco! ⬇️🙏🎶 🎥Welcome to SF On Screen, the series where I show you all the wonderful TV shows and movies filmed in San Francisco🎥 Sister Act is one of my go-to feel good movies, and I love how it takes place right here in San F

item.title: how big an Amtrak Roomette REALLY is 😳 We took the train from San Franisco to Reno, and then back and booked a roomette one way. I was super impressed. Yes, it's small, but super functional. We put the seats down into a bed a few hours in and that was th
item.description: how big an Amtrak Roomette REALLY is 😳 We took the train from San Franisco to Reno, and then back and booked a roomette one way. I was super impressed. Yes, it's small, but super functional. We put the seats down into a bed a few hours in and that was th

item.title: There's a Blarney Stone in Reno, NV! ☘️ A piece of the real Ireland's Blarney Castle was installed of the (former) Fitzgerald's Casino back in 1988. In Ireland, it's tradition to kiss the Blarney stone. The instructions for the one in Reno are to rub it
item.description: There's a Blarney Stone in Reno, NV! ☘️ A piece of the real Ireland's Blarney Castle was installed of the (former) Fitzgerald's Casino back in 1988. In Ireland, it's tradition to kiss the Blarney stone. The instructions for the one in Reno are to rub it

item.title: But actually it's a million degrees but you can't miss Hunk Jesus contest in Dolores Park 🐣 🌈 "D*cks rising like Jesus" #sanfrancisco #dolorespark #easter #bayarea #lgbtq @Hot Gay Nerd
item.description: But actually it's a million degrees but you can't miss Hunk Jesus contest in Dolores Park 🐣 🌈 "D*cks rising like Jesus" #sanfrancisco #dolorespark #easter #bayarea #lgbtq @Hot Gay Nerd

item.title: How many Biggest Little Things can we find in Reno?! 🤔 Reno is the Biggest Little City and the locals take that to heart and claim to be the Biggest Little well... everything. Casino, cafes, bourbon, and districts. On Google Maps I spotted a Biggest Lit
item.description: How many Biggest Little Things can we find in Reno?! 🤔 Reno is the Biggest Little City and the locals take that to heart and claim to be the Biggest Little well... everything. Casino, cafes, bourbon, and districts. On Google Maps I spotted a Biggest Lit

item.title: Coolest Reno, NV hotel ⬇️ I'm a sucker for a good hotel and this little boutique gem just minutes by foot from the Amtrak station is downtown Reno is *chef kiss* 📍Jesse Hotel #renonevada #reno #hotel #travel
item.description: Coolest Reno, NV hotel ⬇️ I'm a sucker for a good hotel and this little boutique gem just minutes by foot from the Amtrak station is downtown Reno is *chef kiss* 📍Jesse Hotel #renonevada #reno #hotel #travel

item.title: use free will to make martinis in a faux fur coat like why not be a little whimsical ok 🍸 Gray Whale Gin, my fave gin of all time it's so flavorful and smooth even people who claim to hate gin like this when I give it to them #martini #cocktails #vibes
item.description: use free will to make martinis in a faux fur coat like why not be a little whimsical ok 🍸 Gray Whale Gin, my fave gin of all time it's so flavorful and smooth even people who claim to hate gin like this when I give it to them #martini #cocktails #vibes

item.title: SF during Coachella Weekends are my favorite. ❤️ There's no crowds, I can actually get a seat at my fave restaurant without lines, don't have to fight anyone for parking or a good spot at Dolores Park...✨ Plus there's tons of fun events happening (like a
item.description: SF during Coachella Weekends are my favorite. ❤️ There's no crowds, I can actually get a seat at my fave restaurant without lines, don't have to fight anyone for parking or a good spot at Dolores Park...✨ Plus there's tons of fun events happening (like a

item.title: SF, it's Cherry Blossom Festival time!! 🌸Japantown springs to life with market stalls, events, demonstrations, the tastiest food to celebrate the spring blooms. 🌸 April 11-12 and 18-19 🚗 I recommend taking MUNI or a ride share since parking will be craz
item.description: SF, it's Cherry Blossom Festival time!! 🌸Japantown springs to life with market stalls, events, demonstrations, the tastiest food to celebrate the spring blooms. 🌸 April 11-12 and 18-19 🚗 I recommend taking MUNI or a ride share since parking will be craz

item.title: I love my lil Aries boy ❤️ Happy Birthday Robin! we always somehow end up at our @Whimsy Homes Cabin for the big life moments and holidays, and I really couldn't think of a better place to celebrate him. I woke up early, did a hot tub dip while he slept
item.description: I love my lil Aries boy ❤️ Happy Birthday Robin! we always somehow end up at our @Whimsy Homes Cabin for the big life moments and holidays, and I really couldn't think of a better place to celebrate him. I woke up early, did a hot tub dip while he slept

item.title: team Courtyard Marriott size wine pours over here 😂🍷bonus points for localish Suisun Valley wine 💅 Paired with @Whimsy Homes Cabin cedar hot tub, I can't think of a better way to spend a Sunday 🤌 #airbnb #wine #lol #hottub #winelover
item.description: team Courtyard Marriott size wine pours over here 😂🍷bonus points for localish Suisun Valley wine 💅 Paired with @Whimsy Homes Cabin cedar hot tub, I can't think of a better way to spend a Sunday 🤌 #airbnb #wine #lol #hottub #winelover

item.title: bet you've never heard of this California region (since half the people I talk to can't even point to it on a map!) 🫣 Calaveras County is truly a hidden gem. It's located 3 hours from SF, 1.5 from Sacramento but it's often overlooked for trendy Tahoe. An
item.description: bet you've never heard of this California region (since half the people I talk to can't even point to it on a map!) 🫣 Calaveras County is truly a hidden gem. It's located 3 hours from SF, 1.5 from Sacramento but it's often overlooked for trendy Tahoe. An

item.title: This audio will live rent free in my head forever I fear 😂 anyways hello from Livermore, there's great wine out here 🍷 #wine #livermorecalifornia #bayarea #visittrivalley #wentevineyards
item.description: This audio will live rent free in my head forever I fear 😂 anyways hello from Livermore, there's great wine out here 🍷 #wine #livermorecalifornia #bayarea #visittrivalley #wentevineyards

item.title: gotta do a bed flip test, first thing upon checking in!! 😂 staying at the Purple Orchid on my media trip to @Visit Tri-Valley and the best passes the test 👌🏻 #visittrivalley #livermorecalifornia #lol #travel #bayarea
item.description: gotta do a bed flip test, first thing upon checking in!! 😂 staying at the Purple Orchid on my media trip to @Visit Tri-Valley and the best passes the test 👌🏻 #visittrivalley #livermorecalifornia #lol #travel #bayarea

item.title: we did the mandatory millennial Japan trip and we're still not over it, exhibit A: our new @DROOL Fujisan print 🏔️🇯🇵 We've been in our same tiny San Francisco apartment for over 11 years (!!!) and I got tired of the tapestry that was hanging on this wall
item.description: we did the mandatory millennial Japan trip and we're still not over it, exhibit A: our new @DROOL Fujisan print 🏔️🇯🇵 We've been in our same tiny San Francisco apartment for over 11 years (!!!) and I got tired of the tapestry that was hanging on this wall

item.title: The best cheese you'll ever have is a 10 yo Wisconsin Sharp Cheddar and I'll 💀 on this hill 📍 Cheese Parlour in Livermore! #livermorecalifornia #cheese #visittrivalley #bayarea #wisconsincheese @Visit Tri-Valley
item.description: The best cheese you'll ever have is a 10 yo Wisconsin Sharp Cheddar and I'll 💀 on this hill 📍 Cheese Parlour in Livermore! #livermorecalifornia #cheese #visittrivalley #bayarea #wisconsincheese @Visit Tri-Valley

item.title: I've already heard 2 different versions out of people's mouth which is it?! I don't want you yelling at me in future videos 😂 #delvalle #livermorecalifornia #bayarea #california
item.description: I've already heard 2 different versions out of people's mouth which is it?! I don't want you yelling at me in future videos 😂 #delvalle #livermorecalifornia #bayarea #california

item.title: the whimsy! 🐄 ✨ best hiking companions, find them in Del Valle Regional Park in Livermore / @Visit Tri-Valley #delvalle #livermore #whimsy #cows #bayarea
item.description: the whimsy! 🐄 ✨ best hiking companions, find them in Del Valle Regional Park in Livermore / @Visit Tri-Valley #delvalle #livermore #whimsy #cows #bayarea

item.title: I think she liked it 🥺 #cows #badbunny #lol #delvalle #bayarea
item.description: I think she liked it 🥺 #cows #badbunny #lol #delvalle #bayarea

item.title: Bay Area, head to Mount Diablo, Del Valley and the surrounding area for the last of the spring lush green hills before they're gone! #bayarea #hiking #visittrivalley
item.description: Bay Area, head to Mount Diablo, Del Valley and the surrounding area for the last of the spring lush green hills before they're gone! #bayarea #hiking #visittrivalley

item.title: whimsical hike with cows in the Bay Area!! 🐄🌲 Del Valle Regional Park in Livermore / @Visit Tri-Valley has cattle grazing trails! These gentle giants have a very important job of munching down invasive species and reducing hazardous fire fuels 🐄 And they
item.description: whimsical hike with cows in the Bay Area!! 🐄🌲 Del Valle Regional Park in Livermore / @Visit Tri-Valley has cattle grazing trails! These gentle giants have a very important job of munching down invasive species and reducing hazardous fire fuels 🐄 And they

item.title: feels like an Olympic task in itself to get those tickets 🤧 so much pressure but gotta make sure all the girlies can see at least one match/game!! #la28olympics #olympics #olympics2028 @LA28 @Olympics #losangeles
item.description: feels like an Olympic task in itself to get those tickets 🤧 so much pressure but gotta make sure all the girlies can see at least one match/game!! #la28olympics #olympics #olympics2028 @LA28 @Olympics #losangeles

item.title: Pack for the Camino de Santiago with me ✨❤️ I'm leaving soon for Portugal to start my 173 mile walk from Porto to the Cathedral of Santiago de Compostela!!! 🫣 In this video, I'm covering what clothing I'm bringing and in Part 2 I'll go over gear, toiletri

item.title: It's called multitasking #redlighttherapy #wine #winelover #selfcare
item.description: It's called multitasking #redlighttherapy #wine #winelover #selfcare

item.title: i've never done anything like this before! 😱 While visting @Visit Tri-Valley , Robin and I got to partake in a very cool floating sound bath at @thepurpleorchid You get all cozy on an inflatable, and Tiffany, the practitioner, guides you through a sound b
item.description: i've never done anything like this before! 😱 While visting @Visit Tri-Valley , Robin and I got to partake in a very cool floating sound bath at @thepurpleorchid You get all cozy on an inflatable, and Tiffany, the practitioner, guides you through a sound b

item.title: name a better combo 🥂 🤝✈️ I'm off to Canada! Byeeee #oliviarodrigo #airport #travel #sparklingwine
item.description: name a better combo 🥂 🤝✈️ I'm off to Canada! Byeeee #oliviarodrigo #airport #travel #sparklingwine

item.title: Canada can you adopt me? Please? 🥺 🇨🇦 just made it to Vancouver for 5 blissful days in Canada with the girls🍁 #canada🇨🇦 #usa🇺🇸 #travel
item.description: Canada can you adopt me? Please? 🥺 🇨🇦 just made it to Vancouver for 5 blissful days in Canada with the girls🍁 #canada🇨🇦 #usa🇺🇸 #travel

item.title: your sign to be whimsical & do a portrait with your girlies! In the Vancouver area with the girlies and we grabbed a portrait on Rocky Point pier. It's so cute! Such a fun thing to do if you ever walk by one Off to Whistler next weee @Samantha 🇨🇦 #canad
item.description: your sign to be whimsical & do a portrait with your girlies! In the Vancouver area with the girlies and we grabbed a portrait on Rocky Point pier. It's so cute! Such a fun thing to do if you ever walk by one Off to Whistler next weee @Samantha 🇨🇦 #canad

item.title: best spa in Canada 🇨🇦 ⬇️ the TLDR is I've visited a few Nordic spas around Canada and I'm insanely jealous this format of spa just isn't available in the United States (that I know of) I'm a sauna cold plunge junkie but add in steam rooms, outdoor firepi
item.description: best spa in Canada 🇨🇦 ⬇️ the TLDR is I've visited a few Nordic spas around Canada and I'm insanely jealous this format of spa just isn't available in the United States (that I know of) I'm a sauna cold plunge junkie but add in steam rooms, outdoor firepi
